214,simple,HS-STRK250R-26,,Hisun Strike 250R — Youth Sport UTV,1,0,visible,"Youth/entry sport UTV. Two-seat, governed for teen riders, four factory colour options.","

The Hisun Strike 250R is the sport UTV we point families at when they want a two-seat trail machine sized for a teen rider and a passenger. Governed speed and manageable power make it a legitimate teaching machine — a step up from a single-rider ATV into proper side-by-side trail skills.

\n

Available in four factory finishes (Black Ops, Destroyer Grey, Tactical Tan, Voodoo Blue). Sport suspension, real ground clearance, and full Hisun dealer support through Reyco. Warranty service and parts handled right here in Sault Ste. Marie.

\n

Most common use case: Algoma families with teens starting on OFATV trails under adult supervision. Pre-order deposits accepted; ask us about current stock and ordering lead times.

",,,taxable,,backorder,,,0,0,,,,,0,,,,,,,http://reyco.glvmarketing.ca/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/800_stike250blue-110557.png,,,,,,,,,0,Hisun,HS-STRK250R-26,2026,new,on_order,"Engine

column2: Black Ops, Destroyer Grey, Tactical Tan, Voodoo Blue

Hisun Manufacturer",1,The Strike 250R is the youth sport UTV I actually recommend. Governed power means kids learn right instead of getting over their head. Parents ride along and teach. Nothing else in this price band does it better.,,,,,,,,,,,,

column1:
215,simple,HS-STRK550R-26,,Hisun Strike 550R — Adult Sport UTV,1,0,visible,"Full-size two-seat sport UTV. 550cc, long-travel suspension, four factory colours.","

The Strike 550R is Hisun's full-size adult sport machine. 550cc power, long-travel suspension, and the ground clearance to handle Northern Ontario trail terrain without bottoming out. This is where Hisun competes directly with bigger-name sport UTVs — similar capability at a price point that makes more sense for most buyers.

\n

Available in Black Ops, Destroyer Grey, Tactical Tan, and Voodoo Blue. Real sport suspension, aggressive stance, and the Outlaw Ride Day lifestyle photography shows the machine in proper trail conditions.

\n

Reyco handles sales, delivery, warranty service, and parts. Financing through our standard application process — bundle with accessories (winch, plow, windshield) into one monthly payment.

",,,taxable,,backorder,,,0,0,,,,,0,,,,,,,http://reyco.glvmarketing.ca/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/800_strike550blue-110937.png,,,,,,,,,0,Hisun,HS-STRK550R-26,2026,new,on_order,"Engine

column2: Black Ops, Destroyer Grey, Tactical Tan, Voodoo Blue

Hisun Manufacturer",1,"Strike 550R punches above its price tag. For customers who want a sport UTV without paying flagship money, it's the machine I point them at. Suspension is legit — holds up on rough trail work without losing composure.",,,,,,,,,,,,

column1:
216,simple,HS-SEC550EPS-26,,Hisun Sector 550 EPS — Utility UTV,1,0,visible,"Mid-tier utility with electric power steering. Five factory colours, real work capability.","

The Sector 550 EPS is the sweet-spot Hisun utility for most Algoma property owners. 550cc power with electric power steering that makes all-day work days dramatically easier on the driver — plowing, loading, maneuvering, trail work. For customers who use the UTV for actual labour, EPS is worth every dollar.

\n

Five factory colours available (Avocado Green, Camo, Destroyer Grey, HISUN Red, Tactical Tan). Rack capacity and towing sized for real property work. Accepts winches, plow blades, and accessory upgrades we install at the shop.

\n

This is the UTV Casey recommends to most people buying their first utility side-by-side. Reliable, priced right, and serviced under the same roof as your boats and lawn equipment.

",,,taxable,,backorder,,,0,0,,,,,0,,,,,,,http://reyco.glvmarketing.ca/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/800_sector550red-102158.png,,,,,,,,,0,Hisun,HS-SEC550EPS-26,2026,new,on_order,"Engine

column2: Avocado Green, Camo, Destroyer Grey, HISUN Red, Tactical Tan

Hisun Manufacturer",1,"Sector 550 EPS covers 80% of people's utility use cases. Power steering makes the difference on real work days — it's not a luxury item, it's a productivity item. Most-recommended utility UTV we sell.",,,,,,,,,,,,

column1:
217,simple,HS-SEC750CREW-26,,Hisun Sector 750 Crew — 4-Seat Utility UTV,1,0,visible,"Four-seat utility workhorse. Three factory colours, full utility capability.","

The Sector 750 Crew brings four-seat capacity to the Sector utility line without compromising on capability. 750cc power, full utility spec, extended body to seat four adults plus gear. For hunting camps, family properties, and work crews who need to move people and tools together.

\n

Three factory colours (Viper Woodland camo, Destroyer Grey, Fresh Avocado). Lee lifestyle series shows the Crew in real hunting-camp conditions. Towing and rack capacity rated for serious utility work — not a de-rated family truck.

\n

Reyco handles financing, delivery, install of accessories (winch, plow), and full service. Most-requested upgrade package: winch plus front plow, bundled into one financing payment.

",,,taxable,,backorder,,,0,0,,,,,0,,,,,,,http://reyco.glvmarketing.ca/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/800_sector750crewred-104342.png,,,,,,,,,0,Hisun,HS-SEC750CREW-26,2026,new,on_order,"Engine

column2: Viper Woodland, Destroyer Grey, Fresh Avocado

Hisun Manufacturer",1,Sector 750 Crew is what you graduate into when the family starts coming along or the hunting party grows. Real 4-seat capacity plus full utility capability. Honest machine.,,,,,,,,,,,,

column1:
218,simple,HS-STRY750X-26,,Hisun Stryker 750X — Sport-Trail UTV,1,0,visible,"Two-seat flagship sport-trail UTV. 750cc, overland-capable suspension.","

The Stryker 750X is Hisun's sport-trail flagship. Built for riders who want more than a weekend trail cruiser — the Stryker is set up for aggressive terrain, overland touring, and technical riding where suspension travel and ground clearance earn their keep.

\n

Available in Camo and HISUN Red factory finishes. The 1V9A lifestyle series shows the machine in real overland conditions — rough terrain, aggressive trails, and technical sections. 750cc engine delivers flagship sport power without flagship pricing.

\n

Reyco stocks, services, and sells the Stryker line. Financing through the same partners as our boats. Accessories including winches, roofs, and windshields installed at our shop.

",,,taxable,,backorder,,,0,0,,,,,0,,,,,,,http://reyco.glvmarketing.ca/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/800_stryker-red-750x-front-angle-w-vents-102322.png,,,,,,,,,0,Hisun,HS-STRY750X-26,2026,new,on_order,"Engine

column2: Hisun Manufacturer",1,"Stryker 750X handles overland and aggressive trail in a way most UTVs at this price can't. If Strike is trail, Stryker is trail-plus. Customers who ride hard end up here.",,,,,,,,,,,,

column1:
219,simple,HS-MP9550R-26,,Hisun MP9 550R — Sport Trail UTV,1,0,visible,"Mid-displacement sport UTV. 550cc, four factory colours, real trail performance.","

The MP9 550R hits the sweet spot for most serious trail riders — 550cc sport engine, proper suspension setup, and a price that keeps customers on the trail instead of stuck deliberating on the showroom floor. Two-seat configuration with four factory colour choices (Camo, Gray, Red, Tan).

\n

MP9 is a pure sport-trail line. Not utility, not crew, not overland — just sport. Suspension geometry tuned for aggressive trail, power delivery matched for the 550cc platform. The model most MP9 buyers end up on when they want real performance without top-tier pricing.

\n

Full Reyco service and warranty support. Parts on the shelf for common wear items; anything else ordered in through our Hisun dealer account.

",,,taxable,,backorder,,,0,0,,,,,0,,,,,,,http://reyco.glvmarketing.ca/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/800_mp9-400-front-angle-red-no-winch-web-105838.png,,,,,,,,,0,Hisun,HS-MP9550R-26,2026,new,on_order,"Engine

column2: Hisun Manufacturer",1,"MP9 550R is where serious trail riders land when they want sport performance without paying flagship money. Enough power for aggressive trail, suspension to back it up.",,,,,,,,,,,,

column1:
220,simple,HS-HS500-26,,Hisun HS 500 — Utility ATV,1,0,visible,"Mid-range utility ATV. Budget-friendly single-rider for hunters, trappers, and property owners.","

The Hisun HS 500 is the utility ATV for customers who want proven reliability without paying premium-brand pricing. Single-rider, mid-range utility spec, and the price point that matches how most Algoma buyers actually budget for equipment.

\n

Used by hunters packing camp gear, trappers running lines, small farm operators moving supplies, and property owners doing seasonal work. Proven Hisun manufacturing — the same engineering that builds OEM machines for other brand labels. Reliability that earns its price.

\n

Service and parts handled here. Financing available — monthly payments that fit typical household budgets.

",,,taxable,,backorder,,,0,0,,,,,0,,,,,,,http://reyco.glvmarketing.ca/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/800_d1c4ff056a6aaf027c14ec92c81dc2da6bd2b507.png,,,,,,,,,0,Hisun,HS-HS500-26,2026,new,on_order,"Engine

column2: Hisun Manufacturer",1,"The HS 500 is the ATV I point budget-conscious customers at. Honest utility machine, reliable, and priced right. Does the work without trying to impress anyone.",,,,,,,,,,,,

column1:
221,simple,HS-FORGE400I-26,,Hisun Forge 400i — Sport-Utility ATV,1,0,visible,"Sport-utility ATV flagship. 400cc, three factory colours.","

The Forge 400i is Hisun's sport-utility ATV — more performance than the HS line, still single-rider, configured for customers who want real capability in a single-rider machine. Three factory colours (Black Ops, Cavalry Blue, Viper Woodland Camo).

\n

For riders who need to cover ground solo, handle rougher terrain than the HS 500 would, or want fuel-injection smoothness (the 400i designation). Rack capacity, towing, and suspension all stepped up from entry ATV specs.

\n

Full Hisun warranty, serviced at Reyco, with parts stocking and accessory installation handled in-house.

",,,taxable,,backorder,,,0,0,,,,,0,,,,,,,http://reyco.glvmarketing.ca/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/HS-FORGE400I-26.jpg,,,,,,,,,0,Hisun,HS-FORGE400I-26,2026,new,on_order,"Engine

column2: Black Ops, Cavalry Blue, Viper Woodland

Hisun Manufacturer",1,Forge 400i is the single-rider sport-utility for customers who want more than HS but don't need full UTV capability. Fuel injection is noticeable — smoother starts and throttle response than a carbureted equivalent.,,,,,,,,,,,,

column1:
222,simple,HS-SEC-E1-26,,Hisun Sector E1 — Electric UTV,1,0,visible,"Full-size 2-seat electric UTV. Zero emissions, quiet operation, real utility capability.","

The Sector E1 brings proper utility UTV capability to the electric platform. Two-seat, real cargo space, and the performance expected from a Sector — with zero emissions and quiet enough operation to park next to the cabin without waking anyone.

\n

Three factory colours (Cavalry Blue, Destroyer Grey, HISUN Red). Charges from a standard wall outlet overnight. Ideal for cottage properties, hunting camps running on solar, golf course operations, and customers stepping away from two-stroke gas equipment for environmental or noise reasons.

\n

Warranty, parts, and service handled by Reyco. Battery and controller service available in-house. Financing treats electric the same as gas models.

",,,taxable,,backorder,,,0,0,,,,,0,,,,,,,http://reyco.glvmarketing.ca/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/800_e1-green-152808.png,,,,,,,,,0,Hisun,HS-SEC-E1-26,2026,new,on_order,"Motor

column2: Cavalry Blue, Destroyer Grey, HISUN Red

Hisun Manufacturer",1,"Sector E1 surprised me when I rode one. Real utility capability, not a de-rated golf cart. For the right customer — cottage owner, hunt camp, property that needs quiet — it's absolutely the right call.",,,,,,,,,,,,

column1:
223,simple,HS-ACENV-26,,Hisun ACE NV — Electric Golf Cart,1,0,visible,4-seat electric golf cart. EV Black or Coastal Blue factory finish.,"

The Hisun ACE NV is a proper 4-seat electric golf cart for golf course ops, large property movement, senior-living facilities, and private communities. Street-legal-speed classification (LSV) in most Ontario applications — confirm with your municipality.

\n

Available in EV Black and EV Coastal Blue factory finishes. Charges on standard outlets. Low operating cost, low maintenance compared to gas golf carts, zero emissions.

\n

Reyco services electric drivetrains in-house, carries battery and controller parts, and offers financing on the cart + accessories (cargo boxes, weather enclosures, canopies).

",,,taxable,,backorder,,,0,0,,,,,0,,,,,,,http://reyco.glvmarketing.ca/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/800_aceblue-112942.png,,,,,,,,,0,Hisun,HS-ACENV-26,2026,new,on_order,"Motor

column2: Hisun Manufacturer",1,"ACE NV is the cleanest 4-seat electric golf cart on the Canadian market right now. For golf courses, retirement communities, large property owners — it fits the role perfectly.",,,,,,,,,,,,

234,simple,HS-GUARDIAN-26,,Hisun GUARDIAN Utility ATV,1,0,visible,"Full-size utility ATV workhorse for hunters, trappers, and property owners.","

The Hisun GUARDIAN is the utility ATV workhorse. Full-sized, single-rider, built for hauling gear to camp, running traplines, and handling rural property work. Lifestyle photography from the Demo Day shoots shows the machine in real-world conditions.

Reyco services GUARDIANs in-house and stocks common wear parts. Financing available.

",,,taxable,,backorder,,,0,0,,,,,0,,,,,,,http://reyco.glvmarketing.ca/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/800_gray-guardian-400-105238.png,,,,,,,,,0,Hisun,HS-GUARDIAN-26,2026,new,on_order,"Engine

column2: Hisun Manufacturer",1,GUARDIAN is the ATV Casey points hunters and trappers at. Honest utility machine at a fair price.,,,,,,,,,,,,

column1:
235,simple,HS-TACTIC-26,,Hisun Tactic Utility ATV,1,0,visible,Mid-tier utility ATV. Reliable single-rider for property work and outdoor crews.,"

The Tactic is Hisun's mid-utility ATV — priced and specced for customers who want more than entry-level but don't need flagship sport-utility. Solid single-rider capability for rural property owners.

Reyco handles sales, service, and Hisun warranty work in-house.

",,,taxable,,backorder,,,0,0,,,,,0,,,,,,,http://reyco.glvmarketing.ca/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/800_tactic400blue-113644.png,,,,,,,,,0,Hisun,HS-TACTIC-26,2026,new,on_order,"Engine

column2: Hisun Manufacturer",1,Tactic slots between the HS 500 and the Forge 400i. Reliable mid-utility for customers who want step-up capability without paying sport-utility pricing.,,,,,,,,,,,,

column1:
236,simple,HS-HS400-26,,Hisun HS 400 Entry ATV,1,0,visible,Entry utility ATV. Budget-friendly single-rider for light property work.,"

The HS 400 is Hisun's entry utility ATV — the single-rider budget option for customers doing light firewood hauling, storm cleanup, occasional trail work, or small-farm movement. Proven Hisun manufacturing at honest pricing.

Service and parts through our shop.

",,,taxable,,backorder,,,0,0,,,,,0,,,,,,,http://reyco.glvmarketing.ca/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/800_bc87fbc39e87cb0e34cf722b75f2413ec7587279.png,,,,,,,,,0,Hisun,HS-HS400-26,2026,new,on_order,"Engine

column2: Hisun Manufacturer",1,HS 400 is the entry ATV for budget-focused buyers. Gets the job done without trying to impress anyone.,,,,,,,,,,,,

237,simple,HS-SEC250-26,,Hisun Sector 250 Compact Utility UTV,1,0,visible,Compact 2-seat utility UTV for tighter trails and smaller properties.,"

The Sector 250 is the compact utility Hisun — right-sized for smaller properties, tighter trails, and riders who don't need full-size displacement. Five factory colours (Avocado Green, Camo, Destroyer Grey, HISUN Red, Tactical Tan). Jamie's Land lifestyle series.

",,,taxable,,backorder,,,0,0,,,,,0,,,,,,,http://reyco.glvmarketing.ca/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/800_sector250-085013.png,,,,,,,,,0,Hisun,HS-SEC250-26,2026,new,on_order,"Engine

column2: Hisun Manufacturer",1,Sector 250 is the compact utility for customers whose trails or properties don't fit a full-size UTV. Right-sized instead of over-sized.,,,,,,,,,,,,

238,simple,HS-SEC750EPS-26,,Hisun Sector 750 EPS,1,0,visible,Full-displacement 2-seat utility with electric power steering.,

The Sector 750 EPS is the two-seat flagship utility Hisun — full 750cc power plus electric power steering for comfortable all-day work days. For customers who need the most capable two-seat Hisun utility on the floor.

,,,taxable,,backorder,,,0,0,,,,,0,,,,,,,http://reyco.glvmarketing.ca/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/800_sector-750-hisun-red-110632.png,,,,,,,,,0,Hisun,HS-SEC750EPS-26,2026,new,on_order,"Engine

column2: Hisun Manufacturer",1,Sector 750 EPS is the top two-seat utility Hisun — for owners who need maximum two-seat capability.,,,,,,,,,,,,

239,simple,HS-STRY550-26,,Hisun Stryker 550X Sport-Trail UTV,1,0,visible,"Two-seat overland sport UTV — 550cc, Nardo Grey factory finish.","

The Stryker 550X is the entry into Hisun's overland-capable sport-trail line. 550cc power, overland suspension geometry, Nardo Grey factory finish. For riders stepping up from Strike to more aggressive terrain.

",,,taxable,,backorder,,,0,0,,,,,0,,,,,,,http://reyco.glvmarketing.ca/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/800_stryker-550x-front-angle-nardo-grey-w-vents-102239.png,,,,,,,,,0,Hisun,HS-STRY550-26,2026,new,on_order,"Engine

column2: Hisun Manufacturer",1,"Stryker 550X is the sport-trail step up from Strike. More aggressive suspension, overland capability, same Reyco dealer support.",,,,,,,,,,,,

240,simple,HS-STRY750CREW-26,,Hisun Stryker 750 Crew (4-Seat Sport),1,0,visible,"Four-seat sport-trail UTV. Same Stryker DNA, four-adult capacity.","

The Stryker 750 Crew brings four-seat capacity to the Stryker sport-trail line. 750cc power, full overland suspension, four-adult seating plus gear. For hunting parties or families who want sport capability without compromising on passengers.

",,,taxable,,backorder,,,0,0,,,,,0,,,,,,,http://reyco.glvmarketing.ca/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/800_750xc-gray-crew-front-angle-165515.png,,,,,,,,,0,Hisun,HS-STRY750CREW-26,2026,new,on_order,"Engine

column2: Hisun Manufacturer",1,"Stryker 750 Crew is our ""best of both"" Hisun — real sport capability with 4-seat family functionality.",,,,,,,,,,,,

The MP9 750R is the flagship of the MP9 sport line. 750cc engine, four factory colours (Camo, Gray, Red, Tan), full sport-trail suspension. For riders who want maximum MP9 platform power.

",,,taxable,,backorder,,,0,0,,,,,0,,,,,,,http://reyco.glvmarketing.ca/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/800_mp9-400-front-angle-red-no-winch-web-105838-1.png,,,,,,,,,0,Hisun,HS-MP9750R-26,2026,new,on_order,"Engine

242,simple,HS-MP9T400-26,,Hisun MP9T400 Entry Sport UTV,1,0,visible,Trail-focused entry sport UTV for riders stepping up from ATVs.,

The MP9T400 is the trail-focused entry into the MP9 sport line. Lifestyle photography from the Cammo Whatley shoots shows real trail conditions. Right-sized for adult riders moving up from ATVs into their first sport UTV.
